description_long: This serving tray features a round, dark-colored base with a smooth, slightly raised rim, supporting a green and gold champagne bottle and two filled champagne flutes. The bottle has a metallic gold neck and a cork stopper, with a silver label reading 'champagne' in cursive script. The two glasses are transparent with slender stems and are filled with a pale, bubbly liquid, likely champagne. The tray itself appears to be made of a hard, possibly plastic or metal material, with a matte finish and no visible handles. The overall arrangement suggests a celebratory or upscale urban setting, such as a sidewalk café or rooftop party. No decorative patterns are present on the tray, and the only visible branding is on the bottle's label.
description: A round, dark serving tray holds a green and gold champagne bottle and two filled champagne flutes, evoking a celebratory urban scene.
description_view_0: Front view showing the champagne bottle with its label facing forward and both filled glasses clearly visible on the tray.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the bottle label partially visible and both glasses positioned to the left and right of the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear-side view showing the back of the bottle, with the glasses now more aligned and the label mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Back view with the bottle's cork and gold neck prominent, one glass mostly obscured behind the bottle, and the other glass visible to the right.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a slightly raised, smooth, and rounded rim with minimal height and moderate thickness, providing a subtle edge to prevent items from sliding off.
attribute_brand_logo: A label with the word 'champagne' is visible on the bottle, located on the front, rectangular in shape, with cursive text. No other logos or marks are visible on the tray or glasses.
attribute_reflective_properties: The tray surface appears matte with low reflectivity, while the bottle's gold neck and label have a semi-glossy, metallic sheen. The glasses are clear and slightly reflective, showing some highlights, but no mirror-like reflections are present.
